retry_reason: Put operations release a reference; retrying would result in double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: Release wrapper: decrements the reference count of the socket buffer (skb) via bpf_kfree_skb. After this call, the caller must not use the skb pointer, as it may have been freed if the refcount reached zero. The function returns void and always executes unconditionally; the caller has no return value to check.
